last_updated_focus: Expanded subskills/01-randomized-experiments with detailed routing, estimands, diagnostics, examples, software notes, and root randomized-experiment scripts.
notes: Preliminary skill package. Both the randomized-experiments subskill (01) and the instrumental-variables subskill (09) have been expanded substantially. Test package-specific code in the target R/Python environment before production analyses. Scripts are templates and should not install packages or transfer data without explicit user approval.
